ItacAcademyItem.Name: Rettori (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One publication, not in British Library catalogue, related to this Academy is: Gratulatio serenissimae Venetorum Reipublicae pro triumphata feliciter ad Phocaeam per fortissimos duces turcarum classe. Habita ab Academia Rhetorum Bononiae in Collegio Societatis Iesu 4. Iulij 1649 (Bononiae, Benatij, 1649).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
